info.description: Core service API — каталог, корзина, поиск, пользователи, магазины.
info.title: FoodSea Core API

post.description: Uploads an image for the product (multipart/form-data, field "image"). Max 5 MB. Allowed: image/jpeg, image/png, image/webp.

delete.description: Removes the image associated with the product

post.description: Authenticates a user and returns JWT tokens
Revokes all refresh tokens for the current user
Exchanges a valid refresh token for a new token pair
Creates a new user account with phone or email and returns JWT tokens

get.description: Возвращает карточку товара по его штрихкоду (EAN-8 или EAN-13)
Returns all brands for use on the filter screen
Returns the authenticated user's cart with all items

delete.description: Removes all items from the authenticated user's cart

post.description: Adds a product to the cart; increments quantity if already present

put.description: Sets a new quantity for the given product in the cart

delete.description: Removes a product from the cart (idempotent)

get.description: Returns the full two-level category tree
Returns a paginated list of products with optional filters
Looks up a product by EAN-8 or EAN-13 barcode
Returns the full product card including KBJU and related entities
Returns all partner store offers for a given product, sorted by price (UC-07 compare prices)

parameters.description: Return only offers with a discount
parameters.name: has_discount

get.description: Full-text search over products with filters, sorting, and pagination

parameters.description: Store UUID — limits min_price and offers_count to this store
parameters.name: store_id

parameters.description: Only products with at least one discounted offer
parameters.name: has_discount

parameters.description: Sort: relevance | price_asc | price_desc | name_asc | name_desc | discount_desc
parameters.name: sort

get.description: Returns all active partner stores sorted by name

post.description: Marks the onboarding as done for the current user (idempotent)
